user.title: Rejseplanen Setup
user.description: Enter your Rejseplanen Labs API key and preferred update interval.

add_station.title: Add Station
add_station.description: Search for a departure station by name.

select_station.title: Select Station
select_station.description: Select the station from the search results.

station_filters.title: Filters for {station}
station_filters.description: Optional: filter this sensor by direction and/or transport type. Leave blank to show all departures. Add the same station twice with different filters to get one sensor per direction.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect. Check your API key and internet connection.
error.no_stations_found: No stations found. Try a different name or spelling.

abort.already_configured: Rejseplanen is already configured. Use the options flow to manage sensors.

add_station.title: Add Station
add_station.description: Search for a departure station by name.

select_station.title: Select Station
select_station.description: Select the station from the search results.

station_filters.title: Filters for {station}
station_filters.description: Optional: filter by direction and/or transport type. Leave blank for all departures.

remove_station.title: Remove Sensors
remove_station.description: Select one or more sensors to remove.

update_interval.title: Update Interval
update_interval.description: How often to fetch new departure boards.

error.no_stations_found: No stations found. Try a different name or spelling.
